name: agentic-engineering-workflow
description: Scaffold an agent-driven team workflow into any workspace. Installs /defect + /idea slash commands plus a bootstrap skill that sets up AGENTS.md, ADR structure, tracker projects + labels, and the CTO/CPO/CDO review triad pattern. Agent-agnostic by design — works with Claude Code natively; portable to Codex and other agents via manual install.
